entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the institution where the experiment was conducted

entities.name: SEMI-ARID INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region characterized by semi-arid climate where the study took place

entities.name: SHALLOW BLACK SOIL
entities.description: The specific soil type on which the cropping systems were evaluated

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The seasonal period during which the experiment was conducted

entities.name: POST-RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The seasonal period following the rainy season during which the experiment was conducted

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The various arrangements of sole crops, intercrops, sequential systems, and ratoon systems evaluated

entities.name: PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The economic performance metric used to identify the most successful cropping systems

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop used as a sole crop and in intercropping systems

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop used as a sole crop and in intercropping systems

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop used as a sole crop and in intercropping systems

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used as a sole crop, in intercropping, sequential, and ratoon systems

entities.name: MUNG
entities.description: A legume crop used as the first crop in sequential systems

entities.name: SETARIA
entities.description: A crop used as a subsequent crop in sequential systems following mung

entities.name: SAFFLOWER
entities.description: A crop used as a subsequent crop in sequential systems following mung

entities.name: ICPLA7
entities.description: A specific cultivar of pigeonpea used in sequential cropping systems

entities.name: RANDOMIZED BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The statistical experimental design used to organize the study with three replications

entities.name: DIAMMONIUM PHOSPHATE
entities.description: A phosphate-based fertilizer applied as a basal dose to all cropping systems

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: A nutrient applied as a top dress specifically to cereal crops

entities.name: ANIMAL-DRAWN WHEELED-TOOL CARRIER
entities.description: The mechanical equipment used to perform most field operations
